title: [CI:DOCS] End-of-Life policy for github issues
body:
RUN-1721 [spike] create EOL policies for issues and PRs

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
Define an End-of-Life policy for issues and PRs
```

comments.body:
I tried very hard to incorporate my stale-count table (below). It is impossible. Even ignoring the issue of counts, even going with a placeholder "click here" or "X" or whatever, the links themselves cannot be done statically because github search requires a YMD string. There is no provision for `created > number-of-days`. And there's no github `include` mechanism for Markdown. Maybe a github action could do it? I give up for now.

---------

|       | Total | >30 days | >60 days | >120 days | stale |
| ----- | -----: | --------: | --------: | --------: | --------: |
| kind/bug | [244](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+sort%3Acreated-asc+label%3Akind%2Fbug) | [187](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+sort%3Acreated-asc+label%3Akind%2Fbug+-label%3Astale-issue+created%3A%3C2023-10-02) | [167](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+sort%3Acreated-asc+label%3Akind%2Fbug+-label%3Astale-issue+created%3A%3C2023-09-02) | [145](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+sort%3Acreated-asc+label%3Akind%2Fbug+-label%3Astale-issue+created%3A%3C2023-07-04) | [26](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+sort%3Acreated-asc+label%3Akind%2Fbug+label%3Astale-issue) |
